game.snake.description: Control the snake to eat food. The map edges wrap around. Avoid biting yourself.
game.snake.details:
f%Eat as much food as possible and fill the entire space with the snake's body.

{tc:yellow}Items:{tc:clear}
{tc:rgb(255,165,0)}${tc:clear} Normal food.
{tc:light_cyan}%{tc:clear} Premium food, gives higher score and temporary speed boost.

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[↑]/[↓]/[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Control direction
{tc:light_cyan}[S]{tc:clear} Save
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.snake.name: Snake
game.snake.msg_eat_special: Premium food eaten. Speed boost active.
game.snake.msg_start: Reach the food and avoid biting yourself.
game.snake.runtime_controls: [Arrow Keys] Move  [S] Save  [R] Restart  [Enter] Exit after finish  [Esc] Exit
